name: Peanut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the peanut butter and margarine until smooth.
2. Add the sugars, vanilla, eggs, flour, baking powder, and soda to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Fold in the chocolate chips and chopped peanuts.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes or until set.
6. Turn off the oven and let cool completely before removing from the pan.
